title: poa lacustris
intro: Poa lacustris, also known as lake bluegrass or lake grass, is a species of grass native to North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Poa lacustris include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
